subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf, O My Afnán! Upon thee be My glory and My mercy. Thy letter hath come before Us and from it have We inhaled the fragrance of thy love for thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی یا افنانی علیک بهائی و رحمتی قد حضر کتابک و وجدنا منه عرف محبه ربک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
